label: Healthier test

files.raw_diff:
diff --git a/app/api/routes/health.py b/app/api/routes/health.py
index a1b2c3d..e5f6g7h 100644
--- a/app/api/routes/health.py
+++ b/app/api/routes/health.py
@@ -7,12 +7,16 @@
 from __future__ import annotations
 
 import httpx
+import time
+from datetime import datetime
 
 from fastapi import APIRouter
 
 from app.core.config import get_settings
 from app.core.logging import get_logger
 from app.rag.vector_store import ChromaStore
+
+START_TIME = time.time()
 
 logger = get_logger(__name__)
 router = APIRouter(prefix="/api/health", tags=["health"])
@@ -47,11 +51,14 @@
         logger.warning("ChromaDB health check failed: %s", exc)
 
     status = "ok" if (ollama_ok and chroma_ok) else "degraded"
+    uptime_seconds = int(time.time() - START_TIME)
+    
     return {
         "status": status,
         "ollama": ollama_ok,
         "chromadb": chroma_ok,
         "llm_model": settings.OLLAMA_LLM_MODEL,
         "embed_model": settings.OLLAMA_EMBED_MODEL,
+        "uptime": f"{uptime_seconds}s",
+        "server_time": datetime.now().isoformat(),
     }

scenarios.title: Health check returns ok status when all dependencies are healthy
scenarios.description: Verify that GET /api/health returns status 'ok' with all dependency flags true when both Ollama and ChromaDB are accessible
preconditions: Ollama service is running and accessible at configured OLLAMA_BASE_URL
ChromaDB is initialized and collection is accessible
scenarios.expected_result: Response JSON contains: status='ok', ollama=true, chromadb=true, and llm_model populated with the configured OLLAMA_LLM_MODEL value

scenarios.title: Health check returns degraded status when Ollama is unreachable
scenarios.description: Verify that GET /api/health returns status 'degraded' with ollama=false when Ollama service is not reachable
preconditions: Ollama service is stopped or OLLAMA_BASE_URL is misconfigured
scenarios.expected_result: Response JSON contains: status='degraded', ollama=false, chromadb=true, and warning logged for Ollama health check failure

scenarios.title: Health check returns degraded status when ChromaDB fails initialization
scenarios.description: Verify that GET /api/health returns status 'degraded' with chromadb=false when ChromaDB collection fails to initialize
preconditions: ChromaDB is misconfigured or collection is inaccessible
scenarios.expected_result: Response JSON contains: status='degraded', ollama=true, chromadb=false, and warning logged for ChromaDB health check failure

scenarios.title: Health check handles Ollama connection timeout gracefully
scenarios.description: Verify that health check does not hang and returns degraded status when Ollama connection times out after 3 seconds
preconditions: Ollama service is slow to respond or network introduces latency exceeding 3 second timeout
scenarios.expected_result: Response is returned within 5 seconds total, containing status='degraded' and ollama=false, with timeout exception logged as warning

scenarios.title: Health check returns degraded when all dependencies are down
scenarios.description: Verify that GET /api/health handles complete service outage and returns degraded status with all flags false
scenarios.expected_result: Response JSON contains: status='degraded', ollama=false, chromadb=false, llm_model still populated from settings

scenarios.title: Health check endpoint accessible without authentication
scenarios.description: Verify that /api/health endpoint is publicly accessible for Kubernetes/Docker health probes without requiring authentication headers
scenarios.expected_result: Response returns HTTP 200 with valid health check JSON payload, not HTTP 401 Unauthorized

scenarios.title: Health check does not expose sensitive configuration values
scenarios.description: Verify that health check response only exposes safe configuration (llm_model) and not sensitive values like API keys or connection strings
scenarios.expected_result: Response JSON does NOT contain fields like: api_key, database_url, password, secret, or raw settings object

scenarios.title: Health check handles concurrent requests safely
scenarios.description: Verify that multiple simultaneous health check requests do not cause race conditions or resource contention in ChromaStore initialization
preconditions: Multiple test clients ready to send parallel requests
scenarios.expected_result: All 10 requests return HTTP 200 with consistent JSON structure, no exceptions or partial responses

error:
Code generation failed after all retries.
Detail: Ollama generate failed:
